title: Queen of Destiny
writer: Miles Malleson, Robert Vansittart, Charles de Grandcourt
actors: Anna Neagle, Anton Walbrook, C. Aubrey Smith
plot: Picking up where Victoria the Great (1937) left off, this sequel has Anna Neagle return to the role of Queen Victoria in another colorful account of the revered British monarch's reign. This film offers a stellar chronicle of Vict...
